film.title: Pardes
film.overview: A teacher falls in love with a wealthy girl but decides to go away from her to earn money.

dialogues.dialogue: Yet, I shall give this a thought. Nothing will happen only by thinking about it, Mr.Rana. I am warning you again that he is shameless and brazen. You can't change him into a decent and respectable man with your wealth. Listen.
dialogues.cause_raw: trying to change a shameless person with wealth

dialogues.dialogue: Crush this hand. it's touched a friend's wife. Why are you getting worried? You are also her brother-in-law. Shameless! When I went to her with all my desires, I went not as her brother-in-law, but as a lover. You have tried to test an innocent woman.
dialogues.cause_raw: inappropriate behavior towards a friend's wife

dialogues.dialogue: Go. She's waiting for you. - She's waiting for me? Yes. - Sajan, I don't know how I can thank you. You have made friendship proud today. God bless you, my friend. Wait here. I'll  come back soon. - Okay.
